title: Physical Media
description: Meet Tony; he's struggling - but he has amazing music taste. Meet Amelia; she's over here from America for a meeting but really just wants to be in a Richard Curtis movie...welcome to the last DVD and CD shop in town, a warm nod back to the pre-digital age! A brand new, quirky comedy play from the pen of multi award-winning writer, Paul Richards, about loneliness, missed opportunities, and unexpected friendships...but let's be honest, it's mostly about Britpop music and why you should actually still own physical things. Performed by Alex Machell and Nicole Horst, with Paul Richards.
